# Pull Request Template

## 📋 Description

Please provide a clear and concise description of your changes.

### What does this PR do?

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] UI/UX improvement
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance optimization
- [ ] Security enhancement
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Other (please describe)

---

## 🛠️ Changes Made

Describe the major changes included in this pull request.

- 
- 
- 

---

## 🎯 Related Issue

Link the related issue if applicable.

Example:

```text
Closes #12
Fixes #34
```

---

## 📸 Screenshots (If Applicable)

Add screenshots or screen recordings to help explain your changes.

---

## 🧪 Testing

Please confirm the following before submitting:

- [ ] Code runs without errors
- [ ] UI is responsive
- [ ] Dark mode works properly
- [ ] Existing features are not broken
- [ ] Tested on multiple browsers
- [ ] No sensitive data exposed
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed

---

## 🔒 Security Checklist

- [ ] No passwords or secrets are hardcoded
- [ ] External API usage is secure
- [ ] Dependencies are safe and updated
- [ ] No unnecessary permissions added

---

## 📚 Additional Notes

Add any additional context, implementation details, or future improvements here.

---

## 🙌 Contributor Checklist

Before submitting your pull request:

- [ ] I have read the contributing guidelines
- [ ] I have tested my changes
- [ ] I have added meaningful commit messages
- [ ] My code follows the project style guidelines

---

## 🚀 Thank You

Thank you for contributing to **SecurePass AI** and helping improve cybersecurity awareness.
